E-bike 10-12h

PRICE: $70 AUD $80 AUD

Specifications

  • Speed Modes:
    • Gear 1: 25 km/h
    • Gear 2: 35 km/h
    • Gear 3: 45 km/h
  • Display: Multifunctional LED display, clearly visible under sunlight.
  • Lighting:
    • Front high-brightness headlight with wide aperture
    • Rear light with laser projection for night safety
  • Phone Holder: USB port 2.1A output, no power bank needed.
  • Safety System:
    • Smart anti-theft remote (alarm + keyless start)
    • NFC smart unlock feature
  • Braking System: Hydraulic disc brakes
  • Battery Hours: 10-12 hrs
  • Battery Life: 48V 80A

Description

Insurance Offered

✔ Insurance only covers theft of battery.

✘ No accident compensation.

✘ No third-party costs insured.

Rental Information

Documents for Rent

  • Name
  • Phone Number
  • Address & Unit Number
  • Email
  • Valid Visa Grant
  • Passport

Our Rental Fee Includes

  • Delivery bag
  • Locks (2)
  • Helmet
  • Charger
  • Basic maintenance

Top Speed

45 MPH

Battery Hours

10-12 hours

Battery Life
